rationale_source: F1.LA missing-source fallback: no broker source, no loan_app field; broker email provides PV $720k + LTV target 65% → derive LA = $468k

requested_loan_amount.rationale: Broker omits explicit LA but provides PV $720k + target LTV 65%. F1.LA missing-source derivation: $720k × 0.65 = $468k. Derived-tier (lowest priority, used only when all primary tiers are empty).

discrepancyHold.rationale: Single derived value; no cross-source discrepancy.

workflow_state.rationale: Awaiting loan_app — broker noted form pending.

outbound_emails.rationale: Broker indicated loan_app form pending; Vienna asks for it.
